summary: Tested Identity Verification feature including ID upload, selfie upload, and phone OTP flow. Found 1 CRITICAL backend-frontend mismatch: Frontend accepts PDF files but backend rejects them. All other tests passed.

critical.issue: Backend only allows image files ['image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/jpg', 'image/webp'] but frontend UI says 'JPG, PNG, or PDF' and accept attribute is 'image/*,application/pdf'. PDF uploads fail with 'Only image files are allowed'.
critical.fix: Either update backend to accept 'application/pdf' OR update frontend to remove PDF from accepted types

minor.issue: No file size validation in backend (frontend has 5MB limit but backend doesn't validate)

ui_bugs.issue: Placeholder '81 234 5678' shows 9 digits but validation requires 10 digits minimum

integration_issues.issue: Frontend accept='image/*,application/pdf' allows PDF selection but backend rejects with error

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/verification/status - returns verification status with all fields
✅ UI Step 1: ID upload page loads with correct elements
✅ UI Step 1: File selection shows preview and 'Ready to upload' indicator
✅ UI Step 1: File size displayed correctly
✅ UI Step 1: Upload button becomes enabled after file selection
✅ UI Step 1: Successful upload shows toast and advances to Step 2
✅ UI Step 2: Selfie upload with capture='user' for front camera
✅ UI Step 2: Successful selfie upload advances to Step 3
✅ UI Step 3: Phone input with +27 country code prefix
action_items: CRITICAL: Fix backend-frontend PDF mismatch. Either: (A) Add 'application/pdf' to backend allowed_types in /api/verification/id endpoint, OR (B) Remove PDF from frontend accept attribute and UI text
Minor: Update phone placeholder from '81 234 5678' to '081 234 5678' (10 digits)
Minor: Add backend file size validation to match frontend 5MB limit

critical_code_review_comments.comment: allowed_types missing 'application/pdf' but frontend accepts it - causes user confusion when PDF upload fails
UI text says 'photo or PDF' but backend only accepts photos

success_rate.backend: 92% (13/14 tests passed, 1 skipped for PDF issue)
success_rate.frontend: 95% (all UI flows work except PDF upload)

context_for_next_testing_agent: ID Verification flow (ID upload, selfie, phone OTP) works for image files. CRITICAL BUG: Frontend accepts PDF for ID upload but backend rejects it with 'Only image files are allowed'. Backend file: /app/backend/server.py lines 1731-1733. Frontend file: /app/frontend/src/pages/IdentityVerification.js line 313 (accept attr) and line 305 (UI text). SMS OTP is MOCKED to console logs.

mocked_apis.note: SMS OTP sending is MOCKED via logger.info() in backend - not sent to actual phones

id_verification_id_upload.issue: Images work, PDFs rejected by backend despite frontend accepting them

id_verification_selfie_upload.notes: capture='user' attribute correctly set for front camera on mobile

id_verification_phone_otp.notes: OTP is MOCKED - logged to console, not sent to real phones

file_size_validation.notes: Frontend validates 5MB limit before upload, backend does not validate
